reviews.review_title: I dont know what happened to the servers
reviews.review_description: good game good long arms good copy good update and good game in genaral but i cant even change my name and the leaderboard is broke so i cant play with people but maybe this will be fixed and i hope this game doesnt get tookdown..
I haven’t played it yet, but it looks super fun. Hope the owner sees this. It looks like the best GT copy ever like no game has ever been better than this. ￼
I met very and he was very friendly and i like the game it’s the best i swear
